applicability_notes: Reduction over given dim(s); dim=None reduces all dims (golden expands to all dims when keepdim=True). Common appearances: variance term of RMSNorm (mean(pow(x,2), dim=-1, keepdim=True)), sequence pooling (dim=1 or dim=-2, keepdim=True), and statistics pooling (mean + mean(centered^2)). Input may be ROW_MAJOR or TILE; tile-padded inputs need ttnn.fill_implicit_tile_padding to neutralize padding before reducing.; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.mean(input_tensor, dim={DIM}, keepdim={KEEPDIM})

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [B, S, H] hidden states, reduced over last dim (RMSNorm variance)
placement_observations.source: RMSNorm call site: inp = ttnn.sharded_to_interleaved(inp, ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG); xnorm = ttnn.mean(ttnn.pow(inp,2), dim=-1, keepdim=True) — sharded input converted to DRAM interleaved before reduction

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [B, 1, C] pooled vector from large [B, L, C] activation (SE block, conv backbone)
placement_observations.source: SE-block call site: y = ttnn.mean(x_nlc, dim=1, keepdim=True); y = ttnn.to_layout(y, ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) — comment: 'call hangs silently. DRAM is plentiful and removes the contention.'

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [B, 1, C] pooled mean/std, small post-reduction tensors (statistics pooling)
placement_observations.source: Statistics-pooling call site: mean = ttnn.mean(hidden_tt, dim=1, keepdim=True); centered = ttnn.subtract(hidden_tt, mean, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG); concat([mean, std], dim=2, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG) — downstream consumers keep pooled outputs in L1

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [B, 1, H] pooled sequence output feeding classifier linear
placement_observations.source: Classifier call site: sequence_output = ttnn.mean(sequence_output, dim=1, keepdim=True); logits = ttnn.linear(..., memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG, core_grid=ttnn.CoreGrid(y=8, x=12), dtype=ttnn.bfloat8_b)
